assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Up to 24 months support (vs 14 months on Regular)' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Additional cost during extended period - extra charges apply only during months 15-24 of version lifecycle' and dedicates a section to cost implications

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer - it only mentions version availability dependency

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response does not mention missing new features or accumulating technical debt as consequences of staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone YOUR_ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration checks with specific command to 'Verify 1.31 is available in Extended channel' using gcloud get-server-config

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Cost-effective compliance path' and recommends Extended channel 'if you need 24-month support for compliance/change management'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response clearly states in operational changes that you must 'Plan minor upgrades 2-3 months before EoS of your current version' and emphasizes proactive planning requirements

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Maximum control over minor upgrades - only patches auto-apply, minor upgrades are manual-only (except at end of extended support)' and 'Minor version upgrades (1.31 → 1.32 → 1.33) require manual initiation'
